name: Honey Instead of Sugar: Baking -NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs with the granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the butter, milk, and vanilla to the egg mixture and mix well.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, alternating with honey, mixing after each addition.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Serve and enjoy your honey-sweetened creation!
